graph LR
subgraph outer
    A
    subgraph inner
        B
    end
    C
end
D
---
+-------+      
| outer |      
| +---+ | +---+
| | A | | | D |
| +---+ | +---+
|+-----+|      
||inner||      
||+---+||      
||| B |||      
||+---+||      
|+-----+|      
| +---+ |      
| | C | |      
| +---+ |      
+-------+
